channel.title: Josh Hudson
channel.description: Full‑Stack Web Developer in Worthing & Brighton | HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, WordPress & Shopify Expert

item.title: Hello World (Again)
item.description: Tutorials, posts, and insights from a web developer focused on performance, simplicity, and modern web tools.

item.title: My First Blog Post
item.description: Welcome to my blog! This is the beginning of my journey sharing thoughts and experiences.
